title: Muratsuchi’s five bills focus on phasing out use of Modified Hydrofluoric Acid (MHF), improving community alert systems, and requiring air quality monitors around refineries.
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1645 will phase out the use of hydrofluoric acid by California refineries.",
    "AB 1646 will require the maintenance of a publicly accessible community alert plan for emergencies.",
    "AB 1647 will require refineries to install and maintain air quality monitors at the refinery fence line and in the community.",
    "The governing air quality agency will be required to publicly report the readings from the air quality monitors in real-time.",
    "AB 1648 will increase the number of state refinery inspectors at the California Division of Occupational Safety and Health (Cal OSHA).",
    "AB 1649 will codify and make permanent the existing Interagency Refinery Task Force created by Governor Jerry Brown."
  ]
}
```
